since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.87%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.67% · BTC +0.49% · Gold +1.76% · Nasdaq100 +1.49%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.87%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.87%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.91%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.91%, LRCX +7.24%, SYNA +7.14%, MU +7.08%, LSCC +6.81%. Laggards: AVAV -5.49%, PLTR -3.85%, SOUN -3.24%, IBM -2.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.75% at $150.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
